visualization.name: RMSX Molstar FlipBook
visualization.description: Render RMSX Molstar FlipBook viewer manifests.
visualization.help: This visualization opens RMSX `rmsx-molstar-viewer/v1` manifests produced by the RMSX trajectory analysis tool and renders the embedded PDB slices with Molstar. The preferred input is the JSON-backed `rmsxmolstar` datatype emitted by the RMSX wrapper. Generic JSON remains accepted as a development fallback, and schema validation runs before rendering in both paths.
